appDescription.message: A lightweight, privacy-friendly extension for blocking distracting websites.

popupStatusEnabled.message: At least one focus mode is active, so enabled domains will be blocked.

popupStatusDisabled.message: No focus mode is currently active.

popupPomodoroFocusLocked.message: Locked focus phase is running with $1 remaining. It cannot be stopped manually.

popupPomodoroBreak.message: Break phase is running with $1 remaining.

optionsDescription.message: Organize domains into groups, then bind each group to focus modes or permanent blocking.

optionsSectionModesDescription.message: This page keeps manual mode and pomodoro. Recurring schedule windows now live in their own schedule management page.

optionsSectionScheduleDescription.message: Manage recurring focus windows here, including workday blocks, evening rules, and overnight windows.

scheduleWindowsDescription.message: Add as many windows as you need so scheduled focus can match your real week.

scheduleEmptyState.message: No schedule windows yet. Add one to start with a weekday rule.

optionsSectionPomodoroDescription.message: Use pomodoro as a temporary sprint mode instead of replacing your default schedule.

optionsSectionRecoveryDescription.message: This section keeps the recovery context and default bypass duration. The blocked page itself now uses a lighter interaction model.

optionsSectionBlockedPageDescription.message: The built-in page is still the recommended default because its behavior stays fully under extension control.

optionsSectionDomainsDescription.message: Manage domains by group first, then edit the selected group's name, active modes, and domains below.

optionsSectionMoreSettingsDescription.message: Reserve space for features that are not ready yet, so later iterations can land without rebuilding the page structure.

allowBlockedPageBypassLabel.message: Allow temporary bypass from the blocked page

allowBlockedPageBypassDescription.message: If disabled, the blocked page can no longer unlock sites for a few minutes. Users must come back here to change it.

placeholderCardHabitsDescription.message: Space for stricter schedules, stronger lock rules, and default work routines.

placeholderCardInsightsDescription.message: Space for interruption reasons, weekly patterns, and recovery summaries.

placeholderCardExperimentsDescription.message: Space for reward unlocks, lighter bypass friction, and alternate blocked-page styles.

newGroupPlaceholder.message: Enter a group name, for example Entertainment

invalidGroupMessage.message: Please enter a valid group name.

groupPreviewEmpty.message: This group has no domains yet.

emptyGroupMessage.message: "$1" is still empty. Start by adding domains to this group.

newDomainPlaceholder.message: Enter a domain, for example youtube.com

unsavedChangesHint.message: You have unsaved changes. Save to apply them.

unsavedChangesConfirm.message: You have unsaved changes. Leaving now will discard them. Continue?

blockedPageDescription.message: This site is blocked right now. Avoid more decisions: go back and continue, or use one short bypass.

blockedPageRecoveryDescription.message: Use a small reset first, then decide whether you still need the site.

blockedPageReasonLabel.message: Why do you want to open it right now?

blockedPageNotePlaceholder.message: Optional: write one line about what you are stuck on

blockedPageResetComplete.message: The 2-minute reset is done. Decide again: do you still need this site?

blockedPageMinimalDescription.message: Go back and continue, or use one short temporary bypass if you really need it.

blockedPageQuickBypassHint.message: This only unlocks the site for $1 minutes, then blocking resumes automatically.

blockedPageBypassDisabledHint.message: Temporary bypass is disabled in settings. Go back to settings to change it.

blockedPageBypassDescription.message: Make impulse harder: choose a reason, wait, then unlock briefly.

blockedPageBypassCountdownHint.message: If this was only impulse, 15 seconds should be enough to notice it.

blockedPageBypassReady.message: Countdown finished. This only unlocks the site briefly.

blockedPageReasonRequired.message: Choose a reason or add a note first.
